title: Tibouchina: The Princess Flower Genus
excerpt: A guide to Tibouchina, one of the most widely cultivated ornamental genera in the Melastomataceae family, prized for its velvety leaves and purple blooms.

title: Melastomataceae: A Complete Family Overview
excerpt: An introduction to the Melastomataceae family — where it fits in the plant kingdom, its defining traits, and why it matters to botanists and gardeners alike.

title: Growing Melastomes at Home: A Beginner's Care Guide
excerpt: Light, soil, water, and pruning basics for keeping melastome family plants healthy indoors or in a home garden.
